nodes.name: 夸祖魯-納塔爾省
nodes.summary: 夸祖魯-納塔爾省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括长脚秧鸡、Hooded vulture、Southern banded snake eagle等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-browed robin-chat
nodes.summary: White-browed robin-chat（White-browed robin-chat，学名 Cossypha heuglini），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于林波波河、夸祖魯-納塔爾省。

nodes.name: 林波波河
nodes.summary: 林波波河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括非洲冠鵰、White-browed robin-chat，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The range includes Angola, Botswana, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Eswatini, Ethiopia, Gabon, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, Namibia, Rwanda, Somalia, South Africa, South Sudan, Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. Its habitats include riverine forests, thickets, and also gardens. In East Africa it can be found up to above sea level, but in the part of its range south of the Limpopo River, it generally occurs at elevations below . In South Africa, its range in KwaZulu-Natal expanded south from the 1950s to the 1970s, but the damage caused by a tropical cyclone in 1987 may have stopped the expansion
